// app.component.ts import { __decorate } from "tslib"; import { Component, ChangeDetectionStrategy } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule, AsyncPipe } from '@angular/common'; import { combineLatest } from 'rxjs'; import { map } from 'rxjs/operators'; import { RuleGroupComponent } from './components/rule-group/rule-group.component'; let AppComponent = class AppComponent { constructor(svc) { this.svc = svc; } ngOnInit() { this.vm$ = combineLatest([this.svc.rootGroup$, this.svc.matchingContacts$, this.svc.savedRules$, this.svc.saving$]).pipe(map(([rootGroup, matchingContacts, savedRules, saving]) => ({ rootGroup, matchingContacts, savedRules, saving }))); } saveRule() { // Subscribe to the save observable (Angular async fire-and-forget) this.svc.saveRule().subscribe(); } }; AppComponent = __decorate([Component({ selector: 'app-root', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, AsyncPipe, RuleGroupComponent], changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, /** * Template uses the async pipe throughout so Angular handles * subscription/unsubscription automatically, and OnPush CD works correctly. * * We combine all streams into a single vm$ Observable using combineLatest, * which is the idiomatic Angular pattern when using async pipe + OnPush. */ template: `
Chemist2U · Audience Builder
Audience Rules
Saved Rules
Rule #{{ rule.id }} — {{ rule.summary }} · {{ rule.contactCount }} match{{ rule.contactCount !== 1 ? 'es' : '' }}
Matching Contacts {{ vm.matchingContacts.length }} contact{{ vm.matchingContacts.length !== 1 ? 's' : '' }}
{{ contact.initials }}
{{ contact.name }}
No contacts match the current rules.
` })], AppComponent); export { AppComponent };
